name: civy
description: Civics-focused social media: read any legislation, comment where you live.

scripts.dc:shell: bun run dc exec --workspace-folder . bash -lc 'sudo /usr/local/bin/init-firewall.sh >/dev/null && exec zsh'
scripts.dc:claude: bun run dc exec --workspace-folder . bash -lc 'sudo /usr/local/bin/init-firewall.sh >/dev/null && exec claude "$@"' --
